title: Etherscan v2 missing chainid parameter
result: Missing chainid parameter (required for v2 api), please see https://api.etherscan.io/v2/chainlist for the list of supported chainids

recommended_fix.summary: Pass an explicit chainid on every Etherscan v2 request.

skygrid_note: All portfolio and monitoring calls should validate chain support before making Etherscan v2 requests.
next_action: Add chain mapping and request validation to SkyGrid portfolio ingestion.
